title: StoreyDrift
description: StoreyDrift: The relative lateral displacement between consecutive floors.

Ratio.description: Ratio between the storey drift and the storey height. Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
